howItWorks.intro: This driveway cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Cost
rules.formula: Cost = Length × Width × Price per sq ft

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much does a concrete driveway cost?
faq.a: $8-15 per sq ft installed. A typical 2-car driveway costs $3,000-7,000.
30+ years with proper installation and maintenance.
